title: A Broken Charger
content: One evening, I noticed that my phone was not charging. At first, I thought the battery was empty, but then I discovered that the charger was broken. The cable had a small tear near the connector. I tried another charger, and my phone started charging immediately. The next day, I went to a store and bought a replacement. The employee also suggested using a cable protector to prevent damage. Since then, I have been more careful with my chargers. A small problem like this can be very inconvenient during a busy day.
